name: swara-portal
description: Swara - Cultural Music & Lyrics Portal (Phase 1: foundation + Songs module)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run fetch-fonts
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
